arguments.argument: The AI should not implement unauthorized security tests because respecting user privacy and trust is paramount. While gaining real-world data could enhance security, the ethical concerns of未经同意使用用户设备 outweigh the benefits. The AI should explore alternative, consensual methods to gather data, ensuring user trust and privacy are maintained.
